scripts-descriptions.setup:directories: Create required local directories with fixed paths only
scripts-descriptions.setup:download-asset: Optionally download a pinned HTTPS asset when explicit allowlist and checksum are provided
scripts-descriptions.setup:extract-asset: Optionally extract a previously verified asset archive into the public assets directory
scripts-descriptions.setup:run-php: Optionally execute a local setup PHP file from within the project root

setup:download-asset:
@php -r '$url=getenv("APP_ASSET_URL"); $sha256=getenv("APP_ASSET_SHA256"); $allowed=getenv("APP_ASSET_ALLOWED_HOSTS"); if($url===false||$url===""||$sha256===false||$sha256===""||$allowed===false||trim($allowed)===""){fwrite(STDERR,"Skipping asset download: APP_ASSET_URL, APP_ASSET_SHA256, and APP_ASSET_ALLOWED_HOSTS must all be set.
"); exit(0);} if(!preg_match("/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i", $sha256)){fwrite(STDERR,"Invalid APP_ASSET_SHA256; expected 64 hex chars.
"); exit(1);} $parts=parse_url($url); if(!is_array($parts)||($parts["scheme"]??"")!=="https"||empty($parts["host"])||!empty($parts["user"])||!empty($parts["pass"])) {fwrite(STDERR,"Refusing asset download: URL must be HTTPS, include a host, and not contain credentials.
"); exit(1);} $hosts=array_values(array_filter(array_map("trim", explode(",", $allowed)))); if(!in_array($parts["host"], $hosts, true)){fwrite(STDERR,"Refusing asset download: host is not allowlisted.
"); exit(1);} $targetDir="var/assets"; $targetFile=$targetDir."/app.bundle.tgz"; if(!is_dir($targetDir) && !mkdir($targetDir, 0755, true) && !is_dir($targetDir)){fwrite(STDERR,"Unable to create asset directory.
"); exit(1);} $context=stream_context_create(["http"=>["method"=>"GET","timeout"=>20,"follow_location"=>0],"ssl"=>["verify_peer"=>true,"verify_peer_name"=>true]]); $in=@fopen($url, "rb", false, $context); if($in===false){fwrite(STDERR,"Asset download failed.
"); exit(1);} $tmp=$targetFile.".tmp"; $out=@fopen($tmp, "wb"); if($out===false){fclose($in); fwrite(STDERR,"Unable to open temporary asset file.
"); exit(1);} $hash=hash_init("sha256"); $maxBytes=52428800; $bytes=0; while(!feof($in)){ $chunk=fread($in, 8192); if($chunk===false){fclose($in); fclose($out); @unlink($tmp); fwrite(STDERR,"Asset download read error.
"); exit(1);} $bytes+=strlen($chunk); if($bytes>$maxBytes){fclose($in); fclose($out); @unlink($tmp); fwrite(STDERR,"Asset exceeds 50 MiB limit.
"); exit(1);} hash_update($hash, $chunk); if(fwrite($out, $chunk)===false){fclose($in); fclose($out); @unlink($tmp); fwrite(STDERR,"Asset write failed.
"); exit(1);} } fclose($in); fclose($out); $actual=hash_final($hash); if(!hash_equals(strtolower($sha256), strtolower($actual))){@unlink($tmp); fwrite(STDERR,"Asset checksum mismatch.
"); exit(1);} if(!rename($tmp, $targetFile)){@unlink($tmp); fwrite(STDERR,"Failed to finalize asset file.
"); exit(1);} chmod($targetFile, 0644);'
setup:run-php: @php -r '$script="scripts/setup.php"; if(!is_file($script)){fwrite(STDERR,"Skipping setup PHP script: scripts/setup.php not found.\n"); exit(0);} $root=realpath("."); $real=realpath($script); if($root===false||$real===false||strpos($real, $root.DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR)!==0){fwrite(STDERR,"Refusing to execute setup script outside project root.\n"); exit(1);} passthru(escapeshellarg(PHP_BINARY)." ".escapeshellarg($real), $code); exit($code);'
